sources.authentication: Ed25519 JWT in Authorization header; 15-minute token; private key server-only
sources.scheduleAndCache: grid/run Single Flight; hourly 30-60m; alerts 5-20m with event invalidation
sources.normalization: QWeather payload -> NormalizedWeatherRun; preserve source attribution and null layered-cloud fields
sources.degradation: serve attributable unexpired cache or mark affected factors unknown; never retain expired alert as current
sources.activationEvidence: commercial rights, actual project quota/QPM/SLA, price, cache/retention and target-region POC

sources.authentication: commercial apikey query parameter; server-only; free endpoint forbidden for commercial production
sources.scheduleAndCache: explicit model/run/variable-set cache; GMT response; weighted-call budget accounting
sources.normalization: explicit models and SI units -> NormalizedWeatherRun with CC BY attribution/modification chain
sources.degradation: remove optional multi-model/layered-cloud comparison before primary weather or safety fields
sources.activationEvidence: paid plan, China route POC, model freshness/completeness and proven incremental value

sources.authentication: Web Service key server-only; native map keys isolated by package/signature/bundle id
sources.scheduleAndCache: bounded candidates; route snapshot TTL by traffic assumptions; no unbounded retries
sources.normalization: WGS84 truth converted once by RouteService to GCJ-02; v5 paths and transit transits response shapes normalized separately into attributable RouteSnapshot
sources.degradation: use licensed unexpired route snapshot or labelled straight-line reference; external navigation remains explicit
sources.activationEvidence: corporate service licence, SKU/quota/price, key binding, privacy initialization and dual-platform POC

sources.endpoint: official NSMC order output via web/client/FTP or cloud-order download URL
sources.authentication: real-name reviewed NSMC/CMA account; no scraper and no invented public API
sources.scheduleAndCache: order only approved products/regions; honor 2/6 concurrent-download and account daily quotas
sources.normalization: HDF/official product -> checksum -> immutable raw -> calibrated/projection-aware COG/frames -> versioned manifest
sources.degradation: hide live imagery and retain sourced forecast cloud layer when orders, frames or rights are unavailable
sources.activationEvidence: account approval, automation permission, product/channel rights, commercial derived-display terms and 30-day POC

sources.endpoint: official EOG Annual VNL v2.2 download object selected from product page
sources.authentication: none unless official download flow changes
sources.scheduleAndCache: annual version check; download once per selected release; content-addressed immutable raw
sources.normalization: allowlisted streaming staged ingest + SHA-256 -> gzip GeoTIFF EPSG:4326 radiance+coverage -> validate -> regional COG/overviews/tiles and point-query index
sources.degradation: show radiance/year/coverage only; no Bortle or visibility claim without calibrated regional evidence
sources.activationEvidence: saved readme/licence/citation, actual object URL, size, sha256 and attribution rendering

sources.authentication: registered CDSE S3 credentials from secret manager; rotate before expiry
sources.scheduleAndCache: static/version check; select first-release AOI tiles through STAC; one immutable download per object
sources.normalization: allowlisted streaming staged ingest + SHA-256 -> GLO-30 COG with GLO-90/nodata provenance -> regional mosaic -> versioned horizon profiles
sources.degradation: mark horizon unavailable/DEM-only; never treat ocean zero or missing tile as measured elevation
sources.activationEvidence: CDSE account/category, accepted licence, selected tile manifest, checksum and horizon accuracy POC

sources.endpoint: official Gaia DR3 bulk repository partitions
sources.authentication: public bulk access subject to current archive policy
sources.scheduleAndCache: release-based; select only intersecting HEALPix partitions; verify official MD5 then internal sha256
sources.normalization: allowlisted streaming staged ingest + official MD5/internal SHA-256 -> ECSV.gz approved fields/magnitude/proper-motion filters -> HEALPix mobile binary chunks and manifest
sources.degradation: reduce limiting magnitude/region or hide high-density layer; do not ship the full catalogue
sources.activationEvidence: release DOI/citation/disclaimer, field policy, selected partition list, checksums and device memory/render POC

sources.scheduleAndCache: minimum two-hour refresh; one fetch per update; no retry on any non-200; content-hash dedupe
sources.normalization: OMM JSON with 1-9 digit catalog IDs -> validated epoch -> SGP4 propagation asset
sources.degradation: hide stale/invalid pass and transit countdowns; preserve source epoch and fetched time
sources.activationEvidence: current use/re-distribution review, selected groups, non-200 alerting and propagation golden tests

sources.scheduleAndCache: cache by algorithm version, WGS84 location, elevation, timezone, night and target
sources.normalization: UTC/IANA time, explicit elevation/refraction/horizon conventions and versioned result
sources.degradation: block only unvalidated calculations; do not substitute remote text or AI
sources.activationEvidence: pinned package and JPL-reviewed golden tolerance set

sources.endpoint: approved HTTPS object URL or temporary official order URL
sources.authentication: source-specific credential resolved at worker only
sources.scheduleAndCache: source-host allowlist, streaming bounded object size, checksum before publish, staged abort/atomic commit and immutable version key
sources.degradation: quarantine checksum/schema/licence failures and retain last approved manifest
sources.activationEvidence: source-specific rights plus first real raw/derived manifest

sources.endpoint: staging MinIO; production one approved mainland OSS or COS endpoint
sources.authentication: workload identity or rotated access credentials; never mobile/client embedded
sources.scheduleAndCache: raw-restricted, derived-private, public-assets, user-media and audit buckets/prefixes with distinct lifecycle
sources.normalization: content hash, encryption, source/version/licence metadata and database current-pointer
sources.degradation: do not publish partial manifests; serve previous signed manifest or report unavailable
sources.activationEvidence: chosen mainland provider/region, price, ICP/CDN boundary, encryption, deletion and restore drill
